# Skill: Authentication and Authorization

Purpose
Implement secure user authentication and role based access control.

Recommended Approach

JWT based authentication  
Secure password hashing using bcrypt

Implementation Process

1. Implement user registration with password hashing.

2. Implement login functionality with credential validation.

3. Generate JSON Web Tokens for authenticated sessions.

4. Implement authentication middleware for protected routes.

5. Implement role based access control where applicable.

6. Ensure secure storage of authentication secrets using environment variables.

7. Protect sensitive API endpoints.

Deliverables

• Secure authentication system  
• Middleware for request verification  
• Role based access control when required
